  • TC2S1 Apex Test Case Motor - Motor Private - Comprehensive (Saudi Riyals) pass
    2026-03-25 12:20:50 2026-03-25 12:30:20 0h 9m 30s+58ms
    TC_002_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    12:20:51 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    12:21:01 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    12:21:06 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:21:08 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    12:21:09 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    12:21:11 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    12:21:12 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    12:21:13 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    12:21:14 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    12:21:20 And I click on 'ComprehensiveCard'
    12:21:20 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '1 - Motor Private' text
    12:21:20 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '1 - Comprehensive' text
    12:21:20 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    12:21:21 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    12:21:21 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:21:21 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:21:21 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:21:22 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    12:21:22 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    12:21:22 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    12:21:22 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    12:21:22 And I scroll to top of page
    12:21:23 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:21:23 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:21:23 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    12:21:23 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    12:21:24 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    12:21:24 And I click on 'MainTab'
    12:21:24 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:21:27 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    12:21:27 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    12:21:27 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    12:21:28 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    12:21:28 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    12:21:33 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:21:33 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    12:21:34 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    12:21:40 And I wait for '6' sec
    12:21:40 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate plus '1' years minus one day
    12:21:40 And I click on 'MotorInformationTab'
    12:21:40 And Verify tab 'MotorInformationTab' is selected
    12:21:41 And Set 'QutAwardedToInput' value to 'random5'
    12:21:41 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:21:41 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:21:42 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    12:21:43 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    12:21:47 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:21:47 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    12:21:47 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:21:47 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:21:54 And I wait for '7' sec
    12:21:54 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'

    12:21:55 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'

    2026-03-25 12:30:20 2026-03-25 12:39:02 0h 8m 41s+684ms
    TC_002_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    12:30:21 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    12:30:30 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    12:30:36 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:30:37 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    12:30:37 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    12:30:40 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    12:30:41 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    12:30:42 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    12:30:43 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    12:30:47 And I click on 'ComprehensiveCard'
    12:30:47 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    12:30:48 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    12:30:48 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:30:48 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:30:48 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:30:49 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    12:30:49 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    12:30:49 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    12:30:49 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    12:30:49 And I scroll to top of page
    12:30:50 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:30:50 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:30:50 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    12:30:50 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    12:30:50 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    12:30:51 And I click on 'MainTab'
    12:30:51 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:30:52 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    12:30:52 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    12:30:52 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    12:30:52 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    12:30:53 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    12:30:58 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:30:58 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    12:30:59 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    12:31:04 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:31:04 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate plus '1' years minus one day
    12:31:04 And I click on 'MotorInformationTab'
    12:31:04 And Verify tab 'MotorInformationTab' is selected
    12:31:05 And Set 'QutAwardedToInput' value to 'random5'
    12:31:05 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:31:05 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:31:06 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    12:31:07 And Select '2 - US Dollars' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    12:31:10 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:31:11 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '3.75' text
    12:31:11 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:31:11 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:31:18 And I wait for '7' sec
    12:31:18 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    12:31:18 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    12:31:19 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    12:31:19 And I click on 'NextButton'
    12:31:24 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:31:24 And I click on 'RiskButton'
    12:31:25 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    12:31:28 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:31:28 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:31:28 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:31:28 And Verify 'QurVehicleMakeErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Make must have some value.' text
    12:31:29 And Verify 'QurVehicleModelErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Model must have some value.' text
    12:31:29 And Verify 'QurChassisNoErrorMsg' contains 'Chassis No must have some value.' text
    12:31:29 And Verify 'QurRegistrationNoErrorMsg' contains 'Registration No must have some value.' text
    12:31:29 And Verify 'QurTypeOfBodyErrorMsg' contains 'Type Of Body must have some value.' text
    12:31:29 And Verify 'QurVehicleColorErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Color must have some value.' text
    12:31:30 And I click on 'QurVehicleMakeCombobox'
    12:31:30 And I switch back to main content
    12:31:31 And Select '1 - komatsu' value from 'PopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    12:31:31 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    12:31:32 And I click on 'QurVehicleModelCombobox'
    12:31:32 And I switch back to main content
    12:31:33 And Select '11 - Equipment' value from 'QurVehicleModelPopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    12:31:33 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    12:31:34 And Set 'QurChassisNoInput' value to 'nanotime'
    12:31:34 And Set 'QurRegistrationNoInput' value to 'nanotime'
    12:31:35 And I click on 'QurTypeOfBodyCombobox'
    12:31:35 And I switch back to main content
    12:31:36 And Select '1 - Sedan' value from 'QurTypeOfBodyPopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    12:31:36 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    12:31:37 And I click on 'QurVehicleColorCombobox'
    12:31:37 And I switch back to main content

    12:31:39 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    12:31:39 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:31:39 And I click on 'CreateButton'

    12:31:44 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'

    12:31:45 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Row created.' text
    12:31:46 And I click on 'VehicleDetailsButton'
    12:31:47 And Select 'TP' value from 'VehiclePremiumDetailsDDL' dropdown list
    12:31:48 And Verify 'VehiclePremiumDetailsDDL' contains 'TP' text
    12:31:59 And I fill IG 'F1_ig' with random values (combo/date/number) and save
    12:32:02 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:32:33 And I fill IG 'F2_ig' with random values (combo/date/number) and save
    12:32:36 And I wait for '3' sec

    12:33:19 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:33:19 And I scroll to 'DriverDetailsButton'

    12:33:21 And Verify tab 'ShowAllTab' is selected

    12:33:23 And I click on 'OtherInformationTab'

    12:33:34 And I scroll to 'EditButton'
    12:33:34 And I click on 'EditButton'

    12:33:54 And I scroll to 'SaveButton'
    12:33:54 And I click on 'SaveButton'

  • TC3S1 Apex Test Case Motor - Motor Private - Third Party (Saudi Riyals) pass
    2026-03-25 12:39:05 2026-03-25 12:43:46 0h 4m 40s+948ms
    TC_003_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    12:39:06 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    12:39:16 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    12:39:21 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:39:24 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    12:39:25 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    12:39:28 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    12:39:29 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    12:39:31 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    12:39:32 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    12:39:36 And I click on 'ThirdPartyCard'
    12:39:36 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '1 - Motor Private' text
    12:39:36 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '2 - Third Party' text
    12:39:37 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    12:39:37 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    12:39:37 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:39:37 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:39:38 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:39:38 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    12:39:38 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    12:39:38 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    12:39:39 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    12:39:39 And I scroll to top of page
    12:39:39 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:39:39 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:39:39 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    12:39:40 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    12:39:40 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    12:39:40 And I click on 'MainTab'
    12:39:40 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected

    2026-03-25 12:43:46 2026-03-25 12:48:24 0h 4m 37s+904ms
    TC_003_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    12:43:46 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'

    12:48:13 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:48:14 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    12:48:14 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    12:48:14 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    12:48:21 And I wait for '7' sec
    12:48:21 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    12:48:23 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    12:48:24 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    12:56:39 And I switch back to main content

    12:56:42 And Set 'CoversPremRow' value to '1'
    12:56:42 And I click on 'CoversSaveButton'

    12:56:47 And I switch back to main content

    12:56:48 And I switch to iframe 'ReInsurancePlansIframe'
    12:56:49 And I click on 'REIPlanSaveButton'

    12:56:49 And Verify 'ReiMethodErrorMsg' contains 'REI Method must have some value.' text
    12:56:50 And Select 'Policy wise' value from 'ReiMethodCombobox' dropdown list
    12:56:50 And I switch back to main content

    12:56:50 And I scroll to 'DeleteButton'
    12:56:50 And I click on 'DeleteButton'

    12:56:56 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Quotation Deleted Successfully!' text
    12:56:56 And Set 'SearchQuotationInput' value to '4 - Cancelled'
    12:56:57 And I press Enter on 'SearchQuotationInput'
    12:56:57 And I click on 'QuotationNumberTable'

    12:56:58 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'

    12:57:04 And I reload page
    12:57:06 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'
    12:57:11 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:57:12 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    12:57:12 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    12:57:12 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    12:57:19 And I wait for '7' sec
    12:57:19 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    12:57:20 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    12:57:20 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    Status Timestamp Details
    12:57:25 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    12:57:35 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    12:57:40 And I wait for '5' sec
    12:57:46 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    12:57:47 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    12:57:49 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    12:57:50 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    12:57:51 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    12:57:52 And I click on 'MotorCommercialCard'
    12:57:57 And I click on 'ThirdPartyCard'
    12:57:57 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '2 - Motor Commercial' text
    12:57:57 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '2 - Third Party' text
    12:57:57 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    12:57:58 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    12:57:58 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    12:57:58 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:57:58 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    12:57:58 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    12:57:59 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    12:57:59 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    12:57:59 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text

    12:58:00 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text

    12:58:02 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list

    12:58:03 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    12:58:03 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    12:58:03 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'

    12:58:09 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    12:58:09 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'

    12:58:15 And Set 'QutAwardedToInput' value to 'random5'
    12:58:16 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    12:58:16 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    12:58:17 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    12:58:18 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    12:58:21 And I wait for '3' sec
    12:58:21 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    12:58:21 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    12:58:22 And I click on 'CreateButton'

    13:06:15 Then I click on 'UserDDL'

    2026-03-25 13:06:20 2026-03-25 13:09:18 0h 2m 57s+925ms
    TC_006_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:06:21 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:06:31 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:06:36 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:06:41 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    13:06:41 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    13:06:44 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    13:06:45 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    13:06:46 And I click on 'MarineCard'
    13:06:47 And I click on 'MarineCargoCard'
    13:06:52 And I click on 'CargoPolicyCard'
    13:06:52 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '10 - Marine Cargo' text
    13:06:52 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '10 - Cargo Policy' text
    13:06:52 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:06:52 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    13:06:53 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:06:53 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:06:53 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:06:53 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    13:06:54 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    13:06:54 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    13:06:54 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    13:06:54 And I scroll to top of page
    13:06:54 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:06:55 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:06:55 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    13:06:55 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    13:06:55 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    13:06:55 And I click on 'MainTab'
    13:06:56 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:06:57 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    13:06:57 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    13:06:57 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    13:06:57 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    13:06:58 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    13:07:03 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:07:03 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:07:03 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:07:09 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:07:09 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate
    13:07:09 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:07:09 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:07:10 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    13:07:11 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    13:07:14 And I wait for '3' sec
    13:07:15 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    13:07:15 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:07:15 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:07:20 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:07:20 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    13:07:21 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    13:07:21 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    13:07:21 And I click on 'NextButton'

    13:07:26 And I click on 'EditButtonQuotationValue'
    13:07:32 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:07:33 And Verify IG 'calc_ig' row '20 - LC invoice value' Local/Amount can be filled

    13:08:05 And I click on 'SaveButton'

    13:08:10 And I scroll to top of page

    2026-03-25 13:12:18 2026-03-25 13:15:20 0h 3m 1s+292ms
    TC_007_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:12:21 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:12:31 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:12:36 And I wait for '5' sec

    13:12:39 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text

    13:12:50 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '10 - Marine Cargo' text
    13:12:50 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '11 - Open Cover' text
    13:12:50 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:12:50 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text

    13:21:47 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:21:48 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text

    13:21:49 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text

    13:21:50 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text

    13:21:51 And I click on 'MainTab'

    13:21:52 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    13:21:52 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    13:21:52 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    13:21:53 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'

    13:21:58 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:21:58 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'

    13:22:04 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate
    13:22:04 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:22:04 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:22:05 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    13:22:07 And Select '2 - US Dollars' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list

    13:22:10 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '3.75' text
    13:22:10 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:22:10 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:22:16 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:22:16 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    13:22:16 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    13:22:16 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    13:22:16 And I click on 'NextButton'

    13:22:22 And I click on 'EditButtonQuotationValue'
    13:22:27 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:22:28 And Verify IG 'calc_ig' row '20 - LC invoice value' Foreign/Foreign Amount can be filled
    13:22:54 And I set IG 'calc_ig' from first row '20 - LC invoice value' to random numbers between '1' and '50' for all enabled cells excluding DDL
    13:22:54 And I click on 'SaveButton'
    13:22:59 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:22:59 And I scroll to top of page
    13:23:04 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:23:05 And I click on 'NextButton'

    13:23:10 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' contains saved value 'QuotationNo'

    13:30:00 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:30:01 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' contains saved value 'QuotationNo'
    13:30:02 And Select '2 - Cheque' value from 'QutCollectionTypeCombobox' dropdown list

    13:30:02 And I click on 'CustomerInfoButton'

    13:30:16 And I scroll to end of page

    13:30:28 And Set 'CoversSerialRow' value to '1'
    13:30:29 And I click on 'CategoryRow'

    13:30:29 And I switch back to main content

    13:30:31 And I click on 'CoversRow'
    13:30:32 And I click on 'CoversComboboxRow'
    13:30:32 And I switch back to main content

    13:30:40 And I switch back to main content

    13:30:41 And I switch to iframe 'ReInsurancePlansIframe'
    13:30:41 And I click on 'REIPlanSaveButton'

    13:30:42 And Verify 'ReiMethodErrorMsg' contains 'REI Method must have some value.' text
    13:30:42 And Select 'Policy wise' value from 'ReiMethodCombobox' dropdown list
    13:30:42 And I switch back to main content

    13:30:43 And I scroll to 'DeleteButton'
    13:30:43 And I click on 'DeleteButton'

    13:30:49 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Quotation Deleted Successfully!' text
    13:30:49 And Set 'SearchQuotationInput' value to '4 - Cancelled'
    13:30:49 And I press Enter on 'SearchQuotationInput'
    13:30:50 And I click on 'QuotationNumberTable'
    13:30:50 And Set 'QuotationNumberSearch' value to 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:30:50 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'

    13:30:57 And I reload page
    13:30:59 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'

    13:31:04 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    13:31:04 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    13:31:04 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:31:11 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:31:12 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    13:31:12 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    13:31:13 And Verify 'loginButton' is present
  • TC10S1 Apex Test Case Marine - Marine Hull - Liability (Saudi Riyals) pass
    2026-03-25 13:31:15 2026-03-25 13:34:42 0h 3m 26s+521ms
    TC_010_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:31:16 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:31:26 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:31:31 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:31:33 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    13:31:34 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    13:31:38 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    13:31:39 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    13:31:40 And I click on 'MarineCard'
    13:31:41 And I click on 'MarineHullCard'
    13:31:46 And I click on 'LiabilityCard'
    13:31:46 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '11 - Marine Hull' text
    13:31:47 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '16 - Liability' text
    13:31:47 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:31:47 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    13:31:47 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:31:48 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:31:48 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:31:48 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    13:31:48 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    13:31:49 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    13:31:49 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    13:31:49 And I scroll to top of page
    13:31:49 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:31:49 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:31:50 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    13:31:50 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    13:31:50 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    13:31:50 And I click on 'MainTab'
    13:31:50 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:31:51 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    13:31:52 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    13:31:52 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    13:31:52 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '0' months plus '30' day
    13:31:53 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    13:31:58 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:31:58 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:31:58 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:32:03 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:32:03 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate
    13:32:04 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:32:04 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:32:05 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    13:32:06 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    13:32:09 And I wait for '3' sec
    13:32:09 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    13:32:09 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:32:10 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:32:15 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:32:15 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    13:32:15 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    13:32:15 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    13:32:16 And I click on 'NextButton'
    13:32:21 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:32:21 And I click on 'AddNewRiskButton'
    13:32:23 And I switch to iframe 'AddNewRiskIframe'
    13:32:23 And I click on 'RiskTypeLiabilityCombobox'
    13:32:23 And I switch back to main content
    13:32:25 And Select '1 - Warehouse' value from 'PopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    13:32:25 And I switch to iframe 'AddNewRiskIframe'
    13:32:25 And Select '1 - Risk Basis' value from 'BreakdownCombobox' dropdown list
    13:32:26 And I click on 'ApplyChangesButtonIframe'
    13:32:26 And I switch back to main content
    13:32:31 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:32:31 And I click on 'NextButton'
    13:32:32 And I scroll to 'RiskCalculationButton'
    13:32:32 And I click on 'RiskCalculationButton'
    13:32:33 And I switch to iframe 'RiskCalculationIframe'
    13:32:33 And I click on 'RiskCalculationEditButton'
    13:32:34 And Verify IG 'RISK_CALC_REGION_ig' row '17 - Marine Sum Insured' Local/Amount can be filled
    13:32:49 And I set SECOND IG 'RISK_CALC_REGION_ig' from first row '17 - Marine Sum Insured' to random numbers between '1' and '50' for all enabled cells excluding DDL
    13:32:54 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:32:54 And I switch back to main content
    13:32:54 And I scroll to top of page
    13:32:55 And I click on 'NextButton'

    13:37:58 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:38:05 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:38:05 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    13:38:06 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    13:38:06 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    13:45:38 And Set 'QuotationNumberSearch' value to 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:45:38 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'
    13:45:44 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:45:45 And I reload page
    13:45:47 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'

    13:45:52 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'

    13:45:53 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:46:00 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:46:00 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    13:46:01 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    13:46:01 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    13:54:57 And Select 'Policy wise' value from 'ReiMethodCombobox' dropdown list
    13:54:57 And I switch back to main content
    13:54:57 And I click on 'CloseButtonFromPopup'
    13:54:57 And I scroll to 'DeleteButton'
    13:54:58 And I click on 'DeleteButton'
    13:54:58 And I click on 'DeleteButtonPopup'
    13:55:03 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:55:03 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Quotation Deleted Successfully!' text
    13:55:04 And Set 'SearchQuotationInput' value to '4 - Cancelled'
    13:55:04 And I press Enter on 'SearchQuotationInput'
    13:55:04 And I click on 'QuotationNumberTable'
    13:55:05 And Set 'QuotationNumberSearch' value to 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:55:05 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'
    13:55:10 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:55:11 And I reload page
    13:55:13 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'
    13:55:20 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:55:21 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    13:55:21 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    13:55:21 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    13:55:28 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:55:29 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    13:55:29 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    13:55:30 And Verify 'loginButton' is present
